validation.first_name_length: First name string length between 2 to 30
validation.last_name_length: Last name string length between 2 to 30
validation.available_at_should_be_date: Available at should be valid date.
validation.proposal_too_long: Proposal too long maximum 1000 character allowed.

error.something_went_wrong: Something went wrong, please try again later.
error.error_in_sending_verification_otp: There is error in sending OTP. Please retry again.
error.invalid_or_expired_verification_token: Provided OTP is invalid or expired.
error.user_not_found: User not found with provided phone number.
error.error_in_uploading_image: There is error in uploading image. Please try again later.
error.you_have_already_a_pending_request: You already have a pending service request. Please wait for it to be accepted or rejected before making a new request.

error.complete_profile_before_finding_jobs: Complete your profile before finding jobs
error.your_proposal_already_pending: Your proposal already in pending. You cannot send another proposal.

success.login_otp_sent: You will get an OTP to the provided phone number.

message.verify_otp: Hello {{first_name}}, welcome to Uber System App! Your OTP for account verification is {{otp}}. This code is valid for a limited time. Please do not share it with anyone.

message.otp_verified_successfully: You're OTP has been successfully verified.
